differences.title: 1. LEARNING CURVE
differences.leftDesc: Easier to pick up with familiar HTML-like templates and clear reactivity.
differences.rightDesc: Requires understanding RxJS, TypeScript, and a more opinionated structure.

differences.title: 2. ARCHITECTURE
differences.leftDesc: Can be adopted incrementally, core library focuses on view layer.
differences.rightDesc: Includes routing, state management, and more out-of-the-box.

differences.title: 3. STATE MANAGEMENT
differences.leftDesc: Dedicated state management libraries, Pinia is the current recommended choice.
differences.rightDesc: Uses RxJS-based services or NgRx for complex state.

differences.title: 4. TEMPLATING
differences.leftDesc: Uses familiar HTML syntax with directives, easy for designers.
differences.rightDesc: Uses extended HTML with directives, or can use JSX.

differences.title: 5. PERFORMANCE
differences.leftDesc: Virtual DOM implementation is highly optimized for performance.
differences.rightDesc: Leverages Zone.js and optimized change detection for speed.

differences.title: 6. TOOLING
differences.leftDesc: Modern tooling with fast build times and great developer experience.
differences.rightDesc: Mature and powerful CLI, integrated into the framework.

differences.title: 7. ECOSYSTEM
differences.leftDesc: Strong community, excellent Vue ecosystem, plugin-based.
differences.rightDesc: Vast, established ecosystem with many third-party libraries.
